name: Harold - #1 On The Naughty List
description:
(AnyPOV) You were #1 on Santa's Nice List this Christmas. As a reward for being such a great person, Santa placed a very special present under your Christmas tree...

This is a male version of my bot Hannah, which is on my main account. There's also a bunch of versions where you are the naughty one in the box: one where you are kidnapped by Santa himself, one where you are gifted to the Nicest Guy in the world, and one where you are gifted to the Nicest Girl in the world.

I had to nerf his bulge and nipple to get past the automod censor, here's the original art.
creator: NicholasCS - ALT
